title: Antigravity 3.0 (New Upgrades): Gemini 3.6, Agent Team-Up Option, Workbench, Low Thinking Effort
summary: Google released Antigravity 3.0 with slash teamwork preview for multi-agent collaboration, a Science Skills bundle for research workflows, Gemini 3.5 Flash improvements, and session syncing between CLI and desktop. The updates position Antigravity as a full multi-surface agent platform competing with Claude Code and Codex.
